note: DRAFT thresholds only. These are NOT sealed by pre-registration. They exist so the S2-F comparator machinery has something to read and produce *_DRAFT verdicts. Bands will be sealed by a separate prereg step later; until then all verdicts carry the _DRAFT suffix and MUST NOT be cited as a passing/failing result.

thickness_ks.desc: Two-sample Kolmogorov-Smirnov statistic between parallel-pair offset (wall thickness) distributions of pack vs real.

entity_mix_tv.desc: Total-variation distance between the categorical entity-type mixes (LINE/LWPOLYLINE/ARC/...) of pack vs real.

layer_tokens_tv.desc: Total-variation distance between the categorical layer-token mixes of pack vs real. No draft threshold is set here (the card specifies bands only for thickness KS and entity-mix TV); this statistic is computed and reported with a NO_BAND verdict until prereg assigns a threshold.
